name: The Devourer Below
intro_text: You have followed the trail of the cult deep into the Arkham Woods. The trees are unnaturally still. The stars above seem wrong — too bright, too close.
Somewhere in these woods, the final rite is being performed. You must stop it before Umôrdhoth tears through the veil entirely.
setup_instructions: Investigators begin on the Main Path.
Shuffle the 6 Arkham Woods locations and place them face-down.
Umôrdhoth (01157) is set aside and enters play when the ritual is disrupted.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — Umôrdhoth is banished
text: With a desperate final act, you disrupt the ritual at its heart. Umôrdhoth shrieks as the dimensional rift closes, hurling it back into the void from which it came.
Arkham is safe — for now. But the cult's master has been denied its feast, and its servants will not forgive you.
Record in the campaign log: *Umôrdhoth was banished. Each investigator earns 3 bonus XP.*

R2.label: Resolution 2 — You fled before the ritual concluded
text: Overwhelmed by the horrors at the ritual site, you retreat into the woods. Behind you, you hear a sound like the tearing of reality itself.
You survived. But Umôrdhoth has partially crossed over. The nightmare is not over.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators fled the Devourer Below.*

defeat.label: Defeat — Consumed
text: Umôrdhoth is fully summoned. Its vast form blots out the sky above the woods, and its tendrils reach for you.
You are consumed. What comes next is beyond mortal comprehension.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were defeated by Umôrdhoth. Campaign ends.*
